Notification Badges

Controls the violation count badge shown on the Reports link in the sidebar. Enable badge and the per-severity filters control which violations contribute to the numeric counter. Read more →

A violation is what Stillwater records when an enabled rule disagrees with what the artist's NFO or images contain on disk. The sidebar badge surfaces the count of active violations directly in the navigation so you do not have to open the Reports page to know whether anything needs attention.

Shows a violation count on the Reports sidebar link. Turn off to hide the badge while still retaining all violations on the Reports page. Read more →

Count violations by severity

Choose which violation severities contribute to the badge count. Unchecking a severity hides it from the count but does not delete the underlying violations. Read more →
